previous_loop: Rapidly produce daily public output without review or recovery time.
residue: Evidence that unchecked repetition increases strain
next_variable: Redesign the loop so output does not consume re-entry capacity.

re_entry_capacity.notes: The loop leaves the operator depleted and less able to restart cleanly.

cap_or_recheck: Reconsider only after adding recovery time, review checkpoints, and a maximum publishing cadence.
next_loop_command: Do not run the current loop form; redesign it around recovery and review constraints first.
